register.description: Link your Discord account to your MIR4 character using a popup form.

pilot.description: Add a pilot employee to your account (Maximum 4).

removepilot.description: Remove a specific pilot employee assigned to your account.

forcesync.description: ⚡ [Admin] Force an immediate live synchronization with the website.

manualregister.description: 👑 [Admin] Register a player using cache check or manual clan assignment.

manualpilot.description: 👑 [Admin] Manually link a pilot to a character owner profile.

options.pilot: Select the Discord user acting as pilot.

manage.description: 👑 [Admin] Manage registered players via interactive menus

cleandb.description: 👑 [Admin] Remove all duplicate nickname entries from the local database.

manualremove.description: 👑 [Admin] Completely remove a player's manual registration and profile.

manualremovepilot.description: 👑 [Admin] Manually remove a pilot from a character owner.

removepilot.error: ❌ **Error:** This pilot no longer belongs to your account.

selectClanMenu.success: ✅ **Success!** The player has been manually registered and locked into the **{clan}** clan.

welcome.message:
👋 Hello {member}, welcome to our server!

⚠️ **Important Requirement:** Your character **MUST** be visible in the official server ranking (Top 1000) for the bot to find you and assign roles.

🔄 **Ranking Updates:** The bot updates the database cache and synchronizes roles every day at **22:00 (EU Server Time)**.

📌 **How to request and acquire your roles automatically:**
1️⃣ Execute the `/register` command to open the popup form and type your in-game nickname exactly.
2️⃣ Do you have employees or pilots handling your characters? You can grant them matching roles easily using `/pilot` and mentioning their Discord account (**Limit of up to 4 pilots total**).
3️⃣ If you ever need to disassociate an employee, simply use `/removepilot` and select the target from the menu.

Enjoy your stay and have a great game! 🚀

logs.syncStart: ⏳ [Sync] Starting role and nickname update routine...
logs.syncAbort: ❌ [Sync] Aborting sync cycle: Member list unavailable.
logs.fetchStart: 🚀 [MIR4] Fetching Top 1000 from the official website...
logs.gatewayWarning: ⚠️ [Gateway Warning] Gateway busy. Falling back safely to cached members list.
logs.imposterDetected: ⚠️ [Security] Resetting imposter nickname for {username} trying to clone {nickname}
logs.memberLeave: 🏃‍♂️ [Leave-Handler] Registered member {tag} left the server. Cleaning up registration and unlinking pilots.
logs.pilotCleaned: 🗑️ [Leave-Handler] Pilot {tag} cleaned due to account owner leaving.
logs.subsystemInit: Sub-system initialized and panels auto-refreshed inside global Client.
logs.panelRecovery: Starting automatic panel recovery and chat cleanup...
logs.commandsRegistered: ✅ All slash commands registered successfully with administrative guards.
